prompt: Conjure a whimsical vintage sepia cosmos, where retro spaceships and jovial aliens dance among stars and planets, echoing nostalgic sci-fi adventures.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to create a whimsical, vintage sepia-toned cosmos. Transform the individual space icons – including the UFO (top-left), rocket (bottom-right), planets (top-middle, top-right), and constellation (bottom-right) – into elements within a dynamic scene. Make the alien figure (bottom-left) jovial and animated. The retro spaceships, jovial alien, and celestial bodies should appear to be dancing playfully amidst stars and planets, evoking a nostalgic sci-fi adventure in this unified sepia cosmos.
objects: Jovial and animated alien figure dancing playfully
